Experience seamless communication across your mobile, tablet, and desktop. Your messages stay in sync so you never miss a beat.

Desktop Beta
Always in sync

One account, every screen.

sync

Instant Cloud Sync

Start a conversation on your phone and finish it on your laptop. Every message is updated in real-time across all platforms.

notifications_active

Smart Notifications

Cuqter intelligently routes notifications to the device you're currently using, avoiding double alerts on multiple screens.

history

Offline History

Access your recent chat history even without an internet connection. Your data is stored locally and securely.

Experience the edge

Privacy by Design

Every message sent through Cuqter is shielded with enterprise-grade encryption. Your data never leaves our secure vaults.

Blazing Fast

Message delivery in under 50ms across the globe.

bolt
128B

Messages Daily

99.9%

Uptime Rate
